user_system_path: Wire detectHiddenOps into the Slack trigger loop so buried high-consequence signals fire a ping without user asking.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema changes, no app/UI/component changes, no new scoring modules without runtime consumer.
required_local_proof: ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run lib/workday-presence/__tests__/trigger-runner.test.ts --reporter=verbose && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run gate:continuity
required_browser_proof: Not required. This is a backend trigger-loop change.
acceptance_condition: hidden-op guardian fires a Slack ping when detectHiddenOps scores a signal >= 50 and the normal trigger path is quiet.
stop_condition: Stop when PR is open, CI green, and the trigger-runner test suite proves the wiring end-to-end.
anti_regression_checks: hidden-op does not fire when normal path fires (no double-ping)
hidden-op dedup suppresses same signal same cursor
